environment.compositionIntent: A pale paper Riley field holds a central low-spread Against pressure aperture: measured horizontal and vertical systems converge into muted red and dark rings, while foreground marks add optical fracture without taking over the middleground news structure.

distanceSafety.reason: Canonical public camera retained: accepted previews already resolve the central Riley aperture and surrounding stripe systems from this viewing scale.

contrast.notes: Soft paper-white light preserves matte Riley flatness while dark line work and muted red pressure rings keep focal separation.

paramSemantics.band: visual placement/readability band for full-world params; distinct from declared compositionOwnership.lane

owns: background atmosphere, palette/value field, shallow depth, and active negative space
surrounding WebGPU-safe environment behavior that gives other parts room to read
avoid: main news-pressure band unless explicitly assigned
main knot or focal tangle unless explicitly assigned

compositionAdaptations: Kept at origin as the enclosing background shell and active negative paper space.
Environment radius and low fog preserve the pale striped room without masking the central aperture.
Kept at origin as the enclosing pale paper stripe atmosphere; radius and fog tuned so active negative space remains visible behind the focal grid.
workshopAcceptance: Inspected the available local concept-reference image directly as advisory-only palette/value/mood evidence: pale paper field, fine measured grid lines, warm tan blocks, and a restrained rust pressure area.
Static check-part-draft succeeded for drafts/world-environment.module.mjs with validation.pass true and no errors.
Playwright preview attempt 2 succeeded with desktop screenshot previews/attempt-002/002-world-environment-draft-desktop.jpg and render report previews/attempt-002/desktop-render-report.json.

Attempt 2 render report healthStatus ok, captureStatus ok, rendererMode webgpu, actualRendererBackend webgpu, nonBlankRatio 1, dynamicRange 136, foregroundOccupancyRatio 0.055869, centerCoverageRatio 0.091632.

Attempt 2 screenshot shows a full-surround pale Riley-derived paper environment with vertical/horizontal optical stripe vibration, shallow cropped rectangular fields, side-depth line systems, and a restrained rust Against pressure blush while leaving the main news-pressure band/grid/knot to other parts.

compositionAdaptations: Kept centered as the dominant selected-news pressure structure.

Attempt 2 render report healthStatus was ok, captureStatus was ok, and renderer facts showed WebGPU mode/backend plus WebGPU-safe MeshBasicMaterial and materialFactoryId evidence for color-field/procedural-marks.

compositionAdaptations: Kept foreground-owned, centered near the pressure aperture, and reduced in scale so broken loops and scratches frame rather than replace the middleground grid.
Render order places marks over the pressure structure as Riley figure-ground disruption while preserving the white aperture.
Kept foreground-owned and reduced in scale so broken loops, scratches, and dot catches frame the pressure aperture without replacing it.
composition modified artist-mark-field from isolated accepted-part defaults
workshopAcceptance: Inspected the provided local concept-reference image directly; used it only for pale paper/warm tan value balance, fine linear density, and restrained reddish pressure accent guidance.
Attempt 2 Playwright preview succeeded and captured desktop screenshot previews/attempt-002/002-artist-mark-field-draft-desktop.jpg.

Desktop screenshot shows a foreground Bridget Riley-style artist mark system: near pale paper catches, broken radial/elliptical loops, short scratches/drips, cropped exit marks, and dot/grid catches around a concentrated non-literal Against pressure aperture.

Render report previews/attempt-002/desktop-render-report.json reports healthStatus ok, captureStatus ok, native WebGPU renderer/backend, nonBlankRatio 0.981386, dynamicRange 177.667, and webgpu-compatible feature facts for MeshBasicMaterial, PointsMaterial, color-field, procedural-marks, and soft-particles.
Static check checks/check-result.json succeeded with validation.pass true and no errors.
